Visualizing Wormhole Distortion of Spacetime

June 10, 2018 - Binxu Wang

This work is motivated by Christopher Nolan’s Interstellar, in which the astronomers drives their ship into a wormhole near Jupiter. The movie shows a gorgeous visualization of wormhole, which I’d like to reproduce in this project.

Principle / Math Formulism

Results

Acknoledgement

Many thanks to Wenhan Guo who has implemented the system in his freshman year, which gives me courage to do the work as a term project.

Thanks to the Astrophysics Seminar course by Prof. Wang, Jing in PKU, which offers me the opportunity to implement this project.
